intents.name: Lighter energy
intents.description: Prefers a lower-energy meal among reviewed in-game options.

intents.name: Protein-forward
intents.description: Prefers a higher-protein meal among reviewed in-game options.

intents.name: Fibre-forward
intents.description: Prefers a higher-fibre meal among reviewed in-game options.

intents.name: Sodium-aware
intents.description: Prefers a lower-sodium meal among reviewed in-game options.

intents.name: Lower-total-sugar drink
intents.description: Prefers a lower-total-sugar drink among reviewed in-game options.

guidelines.remarks: Averages are generally 1,800 kcal for women and 2,200 kcal for men. Active individuals may require up to 2,700 kcal.
Translates to roughly 40g – 78g on a 2,000 kcal diet. HPB advises focusing on unsaturated fats (e.g., healthier oils).
Equates to a maximum of about 20g – 24g daily on a 2,000 kcal diet. Limit as much as possible.
Keep as close to zero as possible. Singapore enacted a ban on partially hydrogenated oils (the main source of artificial trans fats) in 2021.
Translates to roughly 60g for women and 80g for men, depending on body weight and activity levels.
Roughly 225g – 300g daily on a 2,000 kcal diet. Recommendations heavily emphasize choosing whole grains.
Refers to added sugars. 10% translates to roughly 40g–50g (8–10 teaspoons) daily. HPB advises a further reduction to < 5% for additional health benefits.
guidelines.notComparableReason: The food dataset reports total sugar, while this guideline refers to added sugar.

guidelines.remarks: HPB recommends roughly 20g for women and 26g for men. This is achievable by consuming 2 servings of fruit, 2 servings of vegetables, and whole grains daily.
Maintain intake as low as possible while consuming a balanced, nutritionally adequate diet.
guidelines.notComparableReason: The food dataset does not report cholesterol.

guidelines.remarks: 2,000 mg of sodium is equivalent to approximately 1 teaspoon (5g) of salt per day.
HPB generally recommends 8 to 10 glasses daily. Requirements increase with intense physical activity or prolonged heat exposure.
guidelines.notComparableReason: Food water in grams is not comparable with drinking-water guidance in millilitres.

disclosure: Hawker Balance is an educational game, not medical or dietary advice. Nutrition values describe the listed source serving; recipes and portions vary. Its 1-5 health and condition ratings compare servings only within this game's meal or drink catalogue: they are not diagnoses, treatment advice, Health Promotion Board certifications, or universal judgements. Daily reference ranges are general guidance for Singaporean adults and do not represent individual needs. Total sugar is not the same as added sugar.
